name: Land Life Company B.V.
notes: amazing mission of restoring nature. should be skeptical of carbon credits system, but is truly not greenwashing and adds something very good to the world (net positive). should score well

name: Gravity B.V.
notes: digital agency, not super special, focused on making money. not super strong mission or something which is inspiring

name: Brainial B.V.
notes: startup for tender management. not really adding much to the world, just like Gravity.
